title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | Authr
name: Authr
description: Authr is a human-robot task development tool based on Therbligs, helping engineers plan work allocation between operators and cobots.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | CoFrame
name: CoFrame
description: CoFrame is a cobot operator training environment that helps manufacturing staff learn to configure and work alongside collaborative robots.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | Task Interdependence and pRAD
name: Task Interdependence and pRAD
description: This research ran experiments to better understand how operators interact with cobots under varying task interdependence and predicted robot attention demand.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | Hobby Projects & Half-Built-Robots Blog
name: Hobby Projects & Half-Built-Robots Blog
description: A collection of hobby robotics and home automation projects documented on the Half-Built-Robots blog, from small bots to supernumerary robotic fingers.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | Portfolio Website
name: Portfolio Website
description: Background on the development of this portfolio website, covering its React and Ant Design implementation and design decisions.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | IDES
name: IDES
description: A high-level overview of Curt's engineering work at Integrated Dynamic Electron Solutions (IDES), spanning firmware and embedded systems for electron microscopy.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | UW-Madison Research
name: UW-Madison Research
description: An overview of research conducted at the People and Robots Lab at the University of Wisconsin - Madison, focused on human-robot interaction.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | Dedicated Computing
name: Dedicated Computing
description: A brief discussion of several embedded software and hardware projects Curt worked on during his internship at Dedicated Computing.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | Milwaukee School of Engineering
name: Milwaukee School of Engineering
description: Curt earned a Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering at the Milwaukee School of Engineering, studying embedded systems and networking.

title: Curt Henrichs | Portfolio | University of Wisconsin - Madison
name: University of Wisconsin - Madison
description: Curt earned a Master of Science in Computer Science at the University of Wisconsin - Madison, focused on human-robot interaction research.
